data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that support must be available before and after the main appointment. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that such time offsets are enforced in the system. The linked use case describes a scenario where a stylist's availability is contingent on front desk coverage, but it does not provide concrete evidence of the time offsets being implemented or functioning as required, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Time offsets (support must be available before/after the main appointment) are not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
